situational_context: Running comeback Day 80 (18 runs since May 3). On vacation in Saint-Malo (Jul 12-27), running coastal trails. Longest run: 8.0 km (Run #16, Jul 15) — up from 4.9 km at last digest (Jun 14). Running frequency increased in Saint-Malo (every 2-3 days). VO2max running improved to 42 (from 40.6). HRV recovered to 40 ms 7d avg (from 35 in mid-June). RHR dropped to 47-48 bpm. Sleep excellent at 8.14h avg (vacation effect). ACWR at 1.49 — near comeback ceiling (1.50) but recovery markers clean. Weight data unavailable ~4 weeks (no scale in Saint-Malo). Vitamin D retest overdue. E-bike commuting paused during vacation. Returning to Paris Jul 27; sur site Jul 28.

recommendations.text: ACWR at 1.49 — one tick from the comeback ceiling (1.50). Execute Run #19 (6 km recovery) tomorrow only if training readiness >= 40. If ACWR hasn't dropped by Thursday morning, defer Run #19 to Friday and shorten to 5 km.
Schedule Vitamin D retest — now overdue (was due ~Jul 2026, 8 weeks post-comeback). Dec 2025 level was 27 ng/mL (insufficient). Essential for bone health during running comeback at 102+ kg.
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed this week; result before August

recommendations.text: Weigh in on Withings scale upon return to Paris (Jul 27). Last reading ~4 weeks ago at 102.6 kg. Weight trend critical for comeback load management.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR exceeds 1.50 (comeback ceiling) for 2+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 1.49 — borderline. Two rest days should help, but Run #19 will add load.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if training readiness drops below 30 on a planned session day
markers_to_watch.reason: Volatile this week (26-79). Low readiness on session day -> defer the run.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Resume monitoring upon return to Paris — verify weight still <= 103 kg
markers_to_watch.reason: 4-week data gap during vacation. Body composition affects running load tolerance.
